titles.text: Sonic the Hedgehog 2: Hold Right to Win Edition

descriptions.text: Sonic the Hedgehog 2: Hold Right to Win Edition is a satirical ROM hack of the original Sonic the Hedgehog 2, created as an April Fools' Day joke in 2012. The hack's title is an accurate description of the gameplay: the player can complete the entire game simply by holding the "right" direction on the controller.
